# Voxel Busters – Unity Mobile Game Dev Plugins

> Voxel Busters delivers professional Unity plugins for mobile game developers, empowering teams to seamlessly integrate essential iOS & Android features—such as in-app purchasing, game services, notifications, machine learning, and device capabilities—directly within Unity. Over 30,000 developers trust these tools to launch successful mobile projects faster and with less native coding.

**Primary Audience:** Unity mobile game developers (indies, students, studios, enterprises)

## Focused Unity Mobile Plugins

- **Essential Kit** - $95.99
  - All-in-one Unity mobile plugin with 15 native features: Billing Services (IAP), Game Services (leaderboards/achievements), Cloud Services (save games), Notification Services (local/push), Sharing Services, Deep Link Services, Media Services (camera/gallery), Address Book (contacts), WebView, Native UI (alerts/popups), App Shortcuts, App Updater, Network Services, Rate My App, Task Services (background tasks). Designed for Unity-based mobile games needing seamless iOS/Android platform integration.
- **Easy ML Kit** - $99.99
  - Integrates device-powered ML features into Unity mobile games: Barcode Scanner (QR codes, UPC, EAN, Code 128+), Object Detection (real-time recognition), Text Recognition (OCR for 50+ languages), and Digital Ink Recognition (handwriting). All processing on-device for privacy.
- **Screen Recorder Kit** - $95.99
  - Adds high-quality video and GIF gameplay recording to mobile games made in Unity. Features cross-platform recording, social sharing via native iOS Share Sheet and Android Share Intents, and video file access for custom backends.
- **Ads Kit**
  - Smart ad mediation and monetization specifically for Unity games; free with Essential Kit.
- **Permissions Kit**
  - Open-source utility for handling runtime permissions in Unity mobile game builds for iOS and Android.

## Key Unity Mobile Plugin Resources

**Product Pages:**
- [Voxel Busters Homepage](https://www.voxelbusters.com/): Introduction to Unity mobile plugin solutions for game developers.
- [Essential Kit](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit): Core mobile plugin suite—features, benefits, and licensing.
- [Easy ML Kit](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/easy-ml-kit): ML Kit plugin details for Unity mobile games.
- [Screen Recorder Kit](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/screen-recorder-kit): Gameplay capture for Unity mobile titles.

**Complete Feature Lists:**
- Essential Kit (15 features): Address Book, App Shortcuts, App Updater, Billing Services, Cloud Services, Deep Link Services, Game Services, Media Services, Native UI, Network Services, Notification Services, Rate My App, Sharing Services, Task Services, WebView
- Easy ML Kit (4 features): Barcode Scanner, Object Detection, Text Recognition, Digital Ink Recognition  
- Screen Recorder Kit (4 features): Video Recording, GIF Recording, Cross-Platform Recording, Social Sharing

**Essential Kit Comparisons (8 available):**
- [vs Unity IAP](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-unity-iap): Better billing solution
- [vs Google Play Games Services](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-gpgs): Cross-platform game services
- [vs Unity Services](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-unity-services): Comprehensive native features
- [vs Easy Mobile Pro](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-easy-mobile-pro): Mobile toolkit comparison
- [vs Gley Plugins](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-gley): Feature-by-feature analysis
- [vs Prime31](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-prime31): Legacy plugin alternative
- [vs Stan's Unity Mobile Pro](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-stans-ump): Modern mobile solution
- [vs Unity Native Share](https://www.voxelbusters.com/products/essential-kit/comparisons/essential-kit-vs-unity-native-share): Sharing capabilities

**Documentation & Support:**
- [Unity Mobile Tutorials & Docs](https://link.voxelbusters.com/essential-kit-tutorials): Step-by-step guides, best practices, and API documentation
- [Unity Mobile Support](https://link.voxelbusters.com/essential-kit-support): Dedicated support for Unity developers

## Value for Unity Mobile Game Development

- **Rapid Production:** Pre-built plugins save hundreds of hours over hand-rolled native solutions for Unity mobile.
- **Unified Cross-Platform API:** Code once in Unity, deploy on iOS and Android.
- **Lightweight & Modular:** Integrate only required mobile features for Unity games, keeping builds minimal.
- **Privacy by Design:** No forced analytics or hidden dependencies. All ML Kit processing happens on-device.
- **Expert Resources:** Detailed documentation and responsive support for Unity-centric mobile development.
- **Proven Scale:** Trusted by 30,000+ developers worldwide, from indie studios to enterprise teams.
